name: Console emulator saves
summary: Memory-card / save-data paths for PCSX2, Dolphin, DuckStation, PPSSPP, and RPCS3.

name: EXAMPLE: backup logging hooks (RUNS COMMANDS)
summary: Example only: appends a timestamped line to a log file before/after each backup. RUNS COMMANDS.

name: EXAMPLE: save-file viewer (RUNS COMMANDS)
summary: Example only: opens .sl2 and .mcr save files in a hex editor. RUNS COMMANDS.

name: FromSoftware Souls saves
summary: Save-path rules for Elden Ring, Dark Souls III, Dark Souls II (+ Scholar of the First Sin), Sekiro, and Dark Souls: Remastered.

name: FromSoftware Souls save inspector (RUNS COMMANDS)
summary: Read-only viewer that runs tools/souls-save-info.js on FromSoftware saves: full stats for Elden Ring (level/runes/soul memory/base stats) and character names + souls for Dark Souls III, DS2: Scholar of the First Sin, and Dark Souls: Remastered. Requires Node; edit the script path. RUNS COMMANDS.

name: Indie essentials saves
summary: Save-path rules for Stardew Valley, Hollow Knight, Terraria, and Hades.

name: Open-world RPG saves
summary: Save-path rules for The Witcher 3, Cyberpunk 2077, Baldur's Gate 3, and Skyrim SE.

name: Survival & sandbox saves
summary: Save-path rules for Subnautica, Don't Starve Together, Factorio, and RimWorld.
